title: The Dream Called Life by Edward Fitzgerald — Deep Poetry Lines
content:
From the Spanish of Pedro Calderon de la Barca


A dream it was in which I found myself.
And you that hail me now, then hailed me king,
In a brave pal

title: The Meadows In Spring by Edward Fitzgerald — Love Poetry Lines
content:
'Tis a dull sight
To see the year dying,
When winter winds
Set the yellow wood sighing:
Sighing, oh! sighing.

When such a time cometh,
I do retire
In
